underlying_goal: Fix the Neuro Noise WebGL shader background to match the Paper design and apply it across all pages with a dark theme
friction_detail: Claude initially used warm/bright colors when the user wanted a dark theme, requiring a correction.
brief_summary: User wanted the Neuro Noise shader fixed to match Paper's design with a dark theme across all pages; Claude got the color palette wrong initially but corrected to a dark blue/black scheme after feedback.
